since_last: 30% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.21%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 30% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.17% · BTC -0.58% · Gold -0.88% · Nasdaq100 -1.10%. 30% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.21%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.21%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -4.34%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at -8.57%
cards.body: Leaders: ISRG +3.73%, AVAV +3.35%, BIDU +3.05%, ZBRA +2.59%, INTU +2.11%. Laggards: SKHY -8.57%, OKLO -7.94%, CEVA -7.86%, SMR -7.66%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.71% at $134.31
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.71% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
